title: Valid transfer of object of performance
doc_html:
Art. 1856.  Valid transfer of object of performance

An obligation that may be extinguished by the transfer of a thing is not extinguished unless the thing has been validly transferred to the obligee of performance.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
